fields.name: escalation_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the complaint escalation

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp of when the complaint was escalated

fields.name: source_department
fields.description: The department that originated the data (customer services)

fields.name: target_department
fields.description: The department that received the escalated complaint (risk and compliance)

children.name: complaint_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer's complaint

children.name: customer_name
children.description: The name of the customer filing the complaint

children.name: complaint_date
children.description: Timestamp of when the customer filed the complaint

children.name: description
children.description: A detailed description of the customer's complaint

children.name: account_number
children.description: The account number associated with the complaint

children.name: amount
children.description: The amount involved in the unauthorized transaction

fields.name: escalation_reason
fields.description: The reason for escalating the complaint to risk and compliance
enum_values: High-value unauthorized transaction requires compliance review and potential fraud investigation

fields.name: severity_level
fields.description: The severity level of the complaint (HIGH)

fields.name: risk_assessment
fields.description: Assessment of the risk associated with the complaint

children.name: fraud_indicator
children.description: Indicates whether the transaction is suspected to be fraudulent

children.name: regulatory_flag
children.description: Indicates whether regulatory compliance is required

children.name: customer_impact
children.description: The impact of the complaint on the customer (SIGNIFICANT)

fields.name: documents_attached
fields.description: A list of documents attached to the complaint

fields.name: assigned_to
fields.description: The person or team assigned to handle the complaint

fields.name: status
fields.description: The current status of the complaint (PENDING_REVIEW)

fields.name: required_actions
fields.description: A list of actions required to resolve the complaint
